English: Get along well as siblings.

Hiligaynon: Palangga namon ang amon lola.
English: We love our grandmother.

Hiligaynon: Isog ang amon lolo sa amon.
English: Our grandfather is strict with us.

Hiligaynon: Pila kamo tanan sa balay?
English: How many are you all in the house?

Hiligaynon: Mapuli na kami sa probinsya.
English: We are going home to the province.

Hiligaynon: Malayo ang byahe sang bus.
English: The bus trip is long.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ang imo payong subong.
English: Bring your umbrella now.

Hiligaynon: Basi mabasa ka sang ulan.
English: You might get wet from the rain.

Hiligaynon: Mainit gid ang panahon diri.
English: The weather is very hot here.

Hiligaynon: Daw maulan gid sa hapon.
English: It looks like it will rain in the afternoon.

Hiligaynon: Masanag ang bulan sa gwa.
English: The moon is bright outside.

Hiligaynon: Madulom ang dalan kon gab-i.
English: The road is dark at night.

Hiligaynon: Pungko kamo sing maayo sa bangko.
English: Sit properly on the bench.

Hiligaynon: Ubosa ang unod sang baso.
English: Finish the contents of the glass.

Hiligaynon: Diin mo ginbutang ang silhig?
English: Where did you put the broom?

Hiligaynon: Silhiga ang mga dagi sa salog.
English: Sweep the dust on the floor.

Hiligaynon: Ibutang ang mga bayu sa bularan.
English: Put the clothes on the drying rack.

Hiligaynon: Maluya ang lawas sang tigulang.
English: The elderly person's body is weak.

Hiligaynon: Hatagi sia sing mainit nga sabaw.
English: Give him/her hot soup.

Hiligaynon: Inom ka sang bulong sa hilanat.
English: Drink medicine for the fever.

Hiligaynon: Magpahuway ka anay sa idalom.
English: Rest first underneath (the shade).

Hiligaynon: Matahum gid ang inyo balay.
English: Your house is very beautiful.

Hiligaynon: Limpyo ang hangin sa uma.
English: The air on the farm is clean.

Hiligaynon: Nagakanta ang mga pispis sa kahoy.
English: The birds are singing in the tree.

Hiligaynon: Dasig ang dalagan sang ido.
English: The dog's run is fast.

Hiligaynon: Mahina ang lakat sang karubaw.
English: The carabao's walk is slow.

Hiligaynon: May ara kamo sing asin?
English: Do you have any salt?

Hiligaynon: Hatagi ako sing tunga nga baso.
English: Give me half a glass.

Hiligaynon: Husto na ina nga kadamuon.
English: That amount is enough.

Hiligaynon: Sobra ang imo ginhatag sa akon.
English: What you gave me was too much.

Hiligaynon: Iuli ang sobra nga sukli.
English: Return the excess change.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa husto nga pag-isip.
English: Thank you for the correct counting.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa inyo lakat.
English: Be careful on your way.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga maayo ang tanan.
English: I hope all is well.

Hiligaynon: Amen, mangin maayo gid kita.
English: Amen, we will be very well.

Hiligaynon: Paalam na sa inyo tanan.
English: Farewell to you all.

Hiligaynon: Tubtob sa liwat nga pagkitaay.
English: Until we meet again.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon gid ako nga makita ka liwat.
English: I am very happy to see you again.

Hiligaynon: Ngaa nagasungod ang imo bata?
English: Why is your child sulking?

Hiligaynon: Indi ka mag-akig sa akon.
English: Do not be angry with me.

Hiligaynon: Nahadlok sia sa madulom nga dalan.
English: He/She is afraid of the dark road.

Hiligaynon: Huya-huya ang dalaga sa atubang.
English: The young woman is shy in front.

Hiligaynon: Maisog ang amon amay sa amon.
English: Our father is brave/strict with us.

Hiligaynon: Maugod sia nga naga-obra sa uma.
English: He/She is diligent in working on the farm.

Hiligaynon: Matig-a ang ulo sang sining bata.
English: This child is stubborn.

Hiligaynon: Palangga gid sang lola ang iya apo.
English: The grandmother really loves her grandchild.

Hiligaynon: Mag-ayuhay kamo pirme nga mag-ulutod.
English: Always get along well as siblings.

Hiligaynon: Buligi ang mga imol sa banwa.
English: Help the poor in the town.

Hiligaynon: Mapinalanggaon ang mga Ilonggo.
English: Ilonggos are very affectionate.

Hiligaynon: Indi ka maghambal sang malain.
English: Do not speak evil words.

Hiligaynon: Magpasalamat ka sa iya kaayo.
English: Give thanks for his/her kindness.

Hiligaynon: Pasayluha ako sa akon sala.
English: Forgive me for my mistake.

Hiligaynon: Ano ang ginahibi mo subong?
English: What are you crying about now?

Hiligaynon: Nagakadlaw sila sa aton istorya.
English: They are laughing at our story.

Hiligaynon: Maalam ang iya sabat sa pamangkot.
English: His/Her answer to the question is wise.

Hiligaynon: Buot gid ang amon mga kaingod.
English: Our neighbors are very kind.

Hiligaynon: Indi mag-ilinaway sa tunga sang dalan.
English: Do not fight in the middle of the road.

Hiligaynon: Nagaupod kami pirme sa pagsimba.
English: We always go together to church.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang imo kaupod sa balay?
English: Who is your companion in the house?

Hiligaynon: Ako lang isa ang nabilin diri.
English: I am the only one left here.

Hiligaynon: Mag-istoryahanay kita sing maayo.
English: Let us talk properly.

Hiligaynon: Ano ang ginabatyag sang imo kasing-kasing?
English: What is your heart feeling?

Hiligaynon: Nasubuan ako tungod sa natabo.
English: I am sad because of what happened.

Hiligaynon: Indi ka magkabalaka, ari ako.
English: Do not worry, I am here.

Hiligaynon: Maghulat ka anay sa gwa.
English: Wait for a while outside.

Hiligaynon: Dasig ang iya pag-abot diri.
English: His/Her arrival here was fast.

Hiligaynon: Mahina ang iya lakat subong.
English: His/Her walk is slow right now.

Hiligaynon: Nakilala mo bala ang tawo nga ina?
English: Do you know that person?

Hiligaynon: Ambot kon diin sia nagkadto.
English: I don't know where he/she went.

Hiligaynon: Sigurado ka bala sa imo ginasiling?
English: Are you sure about what you are saying?

Hiligaynon: Matuod gid ang tanan nga ginsiling ko.
English: Everything I said is really true.

Hiligaynon: Indi ka magbutig sa imo ginikanan.
English: Do not lie to your parents.

Hiligaynon: Respetuha ang mga malantas sa aton.
English: Respect those older than us.

Hiligaynon: Magbinuligay kita sa sining ubra.
English: Let us help each other in this work.

Hiligaynon: Maayo ang record sang iya pamatasan.
English: His/Her character record is good.

Hiligaynon: Nakalulu ang iya tingog pamatian.
English: His/Her voice is soothing to listen to.

Hiligaynon: Maisog sia nga nag-atubang sa amon.
English: He/She bravely faced us.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon kami sa inyo pag-abot.
English: We are happy about your arrival.

Hiligaynon: Halong ka sa imo pagpauli.
English: Take care on your way home.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga magkitaay kita liwat.
English: I hope we see each other again.

Hiligaynon: Salamat gid sa imo pag-ulikid.
English: Thank you very much for your concern.

Hiligaynon: Wala ina sing kabilinggan sa akon.
English: That is no trouble for me.

Hiligaynon: Proud ang pamilya sa imo kadalag-an.
English: The family is proud of your success.

Hiligaynon: Mag-antos kita para sa kaayuhan.
English: Let us endure for the sake of good.

Hiligaynon: Maayo gid ang inyo ginpakita.
English: What you showed was very good.

Hiligaynon: Indi kamo magpahigad sa kinahanglanon.
English: Do not set aside what is necessary.

Hiligaynon: Magpangamuyo kita sa Dios.
English: Let us pray to God.

Hiligaynon: Amen, amo gid ina ang dapat.
English: Amen, that is exactly how it should be.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka tuig na kamo nga mag-asawa?
English: How many years have you been married?

Hiligaynon: Lima na ka tuig kami nga upod.
English: We have been together for five years.

Hiligaynon: May ara na kamo sing bata?
English: Do you already have a child?

Hiligaynon: Isá pa lang ang amon anak.
English: We only have one child so far.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon ang amon pagpuyo diri.
English: Our living here is happy.

Hiligaynon: Diin dampi ang inyo balay?
English: Whereabouts is your house?

Hiligaynon: Didto sa binit sang suba.
English: There by the side of the river.

Hiligaynon: Bisitahan niyo kami kon may oras.
English: Visit us if you have time.

Hiligaynon: Hu-o, makadto kami didto bwas.
English: Yes, we will go there tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa pag-agda sa amon.
English: Thank you for inviting us.

Hiligaynon: Gamay lang ang amon balay.
English: Our house is just small.

Hiligaynon: Pero limpyo ang amon palibot.
English: But our surroundings are clean.

Hiligaynon: Matam-is ang amon pag-ubay.
English: Our guidance (of each other) is sweet.

Hiligaynon: Indi mag-untat sa pagbinuligay.
English: Do not stop helping each other.

Hiligaynon: Masanag ang aton palaabuton.
English: Our future is bright.

Hiligaynon: Tapuson naton ining ubra subong.
English: Let us finish this work today.

Hiligaynon: Ubosa ang inyo pasensya sa bata.
English: Exhaust your patience for the child.

Hiligaynon: Mahumok ang iya buot sa amon.
English: His/Her heart is soft toward us.

Hiligaynon: Isog ang iya hambal pero maayo sia.
English: His/Her words are harsh but he/she is good.

Hiligaynon: Nakit-an ko sia nga naga-isahanon.
English: I saw him/her being alone.

Hiligaynon: Ginpamangkot ko sia kon kamusta sia.
English: I asked him/her how he/she was.

Hiligaynon: Nagsabat sia nga maayo man sia.
English: He/She answered that he/she was fine.

Hiligaynon: Nagkadlaw kami nga duha.
English: The two of us laughed.

Hiligaynon: Namit gid ang amon istoryahanay.
English: Our conversation was very pleasant.

Hiligaynon: Pila na ang oras sang inyo lakat?
English: What time is your departure?

Hiligaynon: Alas-otso kami sang gab-i malakat.
English: We will leave at eight in the evening.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa dalan pirme.
English: Always be careful on the road.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ining pagkaon para sa byahe.
English: Take this food for the trip.

Hiligaynon: Salamat gid sa inyo regalo.
English: Thank you very much for your gift.

Hiligaynon: Batuna ining pasalamat halin sa amon.
English: Accept this thanks from us.

Hiligaynon: Wala na sing iban pa nga problema?
English: Is there no other problem?

Hiligaynon: Wala na, maayo na ang tanan.
English: None anymore, everything is fine now.

Hiligaynon: Mag-upod kamo sa amon sa kalingawan.
English: Come with us for some fun.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon ang mga tawo sa pyesta.
English: The people are happy at the fiesta.

Hiligaynon: Matahum ang mga sapat sa latagon.
English: The animals in the field are beautiful.

Hiligaynon: Madamo ang nagapamati sa iya.
English: Many are listening to him/her.

Hiligaynon: Maalam gid sia magdala sang tawo.
English: He/She is very good at leading people.

Hiligaynon: Respetado sia sa amon baryo.
English: He/She is respected in our village.

Hiligaynon: Buot kag maugod nga pagkatawo.
English: A kind and hardworking personality.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga sundon sia sang iban.
English: I hope others follow him/her.

Hiligaynon: Amen, mangin maayo ang komunidad.
English: Amen, the community will be good.

Hiligaynon: Paalam na, malakat na kami.
English: Farewell, we are leaving now.

Hiligaynon: Tubtob sa liwat nga pagkitaay naton.
English: Until we see each other again.

Hiligaynon: Maayong gab-i sa inyo tanan.
English: Good night to you all.

Hiligaynon: Magtulog kamo sing maayo.
English: Sleep well.

Hiligaynon: Bugtaw kita bwas sa kasanagon.
English: We will wake up at dawn tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Mag-obra kita para sa aton pamilya.
English: Let us work for our family.

Hiligaynon: Ang Dios mag-upod sa aton.
English: God be with us.

Hiligaynon: Maayo gid ang aton palaabuton.
English: Our future is very good.

Hiligaynon: Makadto ako sa merkado subong.
English: I am going to the market now.

Hiligaynon: Tagpila ang kilo sang bugas?
English: How much is a kilo of rice?

Hiligaynon: Mahal gid ang presyo sang isda.
English: The price of fish is very expensive.

Hiligaynon: Hatagi ako sing gamay nga tawad.
English: Give me a little discount.

Hiligaynon: Barato na ina nga baligya.
English: That item is already cheap.

Hiligaynon: Pila ang kabilugan sang akon bakwa?
English: How much is the total of my purchase?

Hiligaynon: Wala na kamo sing gamay nga sinsilyo?
English: Do you have no more small change?

Hiligaynon: Ari ang akon bayad sa imo.
English: Here is my payment to you.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka porsyento ang tubo sini?
English: What percentage is the profit of this?

Hiligaynon: Nagautang sia para sa iya puhunan.
English: He/She is borrowing for his/her capital.

Hiligaynon: Kinahanglan naton magtipon sang kwarta.
English: We need to save money.

Hiligaynon: Gastos gid ang magbiyahe sa malayo.
English: Traveling far is very costly.

Hiligaynon: May ara kamo sang ginabaligya nga manok?
English: Do you have any chickens for sale?

Hiligaynon: Bakal ka sang asin kag kalamay.
English: Buy some salt and sugar.

Hiligaynon: Diin dampi ang baylaran diri?
English: Where is the payment counter here?

Hiligaynon: Bukas na ang tindahan sa kanto.
English: The store at the corner is open already.

Hiligaynon: Sirado ang banko kon Sabado.
English: The bank is closed on Saturdays.

Hiligaynon: Pila ang sweldo mo kada semana?
English: How much is your salary every week?

Hiligaynon: Kulang ang sulod sang akon pitaka.
English: The contents of my wallet are lacking.

Hiligaynon: Nadula ang akon kwarta sa dalan.
English: My money was lost on the road.

Hiligaynon: Mag-isip ka sing maayo sang sukli.
English: Count the change carefully.

Hiligaynon: Husto gid ang imo itir sa amon.
English: Your calculation for us is exactly right.

Hiligaynon: Indi magdaya sa pagtimbang sang karne.
English: Do not cheat in weighing the meat.

Hiligaynon: Malapad ang pwesto niya sa merkado.
English: His/Her stall in the market is wide.

Hiligaynon: Madamo ang nagabakal sa iya subong.
English: Many people are buying from him/her now.

Hiligaynon: Preska pa ang mga utan halin sa uma.
English: The vegetables from the farm are still fresh.

Hiligaynon: Ubos na ang baligya nga itlog.

Hiligaynon: San-o maabot ang bag-o nga karga?

Hiligaynon: Malakat ang trak sa alas-otso.
English: The truck will leave at eight o'clock.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka sako ang i-deliver niyo?
English: How many sacks will you deliver?

Hiligaynon: Bug-at gid ang sako sang asukar.
English: The sack of sugar is very heavy.

Hiligaynon: Magang-an lang ining mga tela.
English: These fabrics are just light.

Hiligaynon: Ilista ang iya utang sa notebook.
English: List his/her debt in the notebook.

Hiligaynon: Bayari ang imo obligasyon sa oras.
English: Pay your obligation on time.

Hiligaynon: Wala ako sing kwarta nga papel subong.
English: I don't have paper money right now.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka pesos ang bayad sa plete?
English: How many pesos is the fare?

Hiligaynon: Tagsingkuenta ang kada tumpok sini.
English: Each pile of this is fifty pesos.

Hiligaynon: Batuna ining resibo sang imo bakal.
English: Accept this receipt for your purchase.

Hiligaynon: Maalam sia magnegosyo sa banwa.
English: He/She is wise in doing business in town.

Hiligaynon: Maugod sia sa pagpangita sang pangabuhian.
English: He/She is diligent in seeking a livelihood.

Hiligaynon: Magbinuligay kita sa pagbaligya.
English: Let's help each other in selling.

Hiligaynon: Indi kamo mag-away tungod sa kwarta.
English: Do not fight because of money.

Hiligaynon: Respetuha ang presyo sang tindera.
English: Respect the price of the vendor.

Hiligaynon: May discount kamo kon magbakal madamo.
English: You have a discount if you buy many.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka dusing ang gusto mo?
English: How many dozen do you want?

Hiligaynon: Isá ka gatos ka pesos ang tanan.
English: Everything is one hundred pesos.

Hiligaynon: Ari ang imo sukli nga dyes pesos.
English: Here is your ten pesos change.

Hiligaynon: Salamat gid sa imo pagbakal sa amon.
English: Thank you very much for buying from us.

Hiligaynon: Balik ka liwat sa masunod nga semana.
English: Come back again next week.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga mag-uswag ang inyo negosyo.
English: I hope your business progresses/prospers.

Hiligaynon: Amen, salamat sa imo pangamuyo.
English: Amen, thank you for your prayer.

Hiligaynon: Diin dampi ang paradahan sang dyip?
English: Where is the jeepney terminal?

Hiligaynon: Malayo pa bala ang lalakton naton?
English: Do we still have a long way to walk?

Hiligaynon: Malapit na lang kita mag-abot.
English: We are almost there.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ang imo listahan sang baklon.
English: Bring your list of things to buy.

Hiligaynon: Basi malimtan mo ang iban nga gamit.
English: You might forget the other items.

Hiligaynon: Mainit gid sa gwa sang merkado.
English: It is very hot outside the market.

Hiligaynon: Pungko anay sa landong sang kahoy.
English: Sit first in the shade of the tree.

Hiligaynon: Inom ka sang mabugnaw nga tubig.
English: Drink some cold water.

Hiligaynon: Diin ang botika nga pinakamalapit?
English: Where is the nearest drugstore?

Hiligaynon: Bakal ka sang bulong sa hilanat.
English: Buy some medicine for fever.

Hiligaynon: Pila ang kantidad sang reseta mo?
English: What is the amount of your prescription?

Hiligaynon: Mabuhay pa ang aton paghulat diri.
English: Our waiting here will take a long time.

Hiligaynon: Tapos na ang oras sang pag-obra.
English: The working hours are over.

Hiligaynon: Mapuli na ang mga naga-obra sa uma.
English: The farm workers are going home now.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon kami kay may kita subong.
English: We are happy because there is an income today.

Hiligaynon: Ihatag ang kwarta sa imo asawa.
English: Give the money to your wife.

Hiligaynon: Ipanigana ang para sa pag-eskwela.
English: Set aside the portion for schooling.

Hiligaynon: Ang ihibalo amo ang matuod nga manggad.
English: Knowledge is the true wealth.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa inyo pagpauli.
English: Be careful on your way home.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ining pasalubong para sa mga bata.
English: Take this gift for the children.

Hiligaynon: Namit gid ang tinapay halin sa banwa.
English: The bread from town is very delicious.

Hiligaynon: Ubosa ang inyo panyaga subong.
English: Finish your lunch now.

Hiligaynon: Busog na gid ang tanan sa balay.
English: Everyone at home is very full.

Hiligaynon: Patya ang suga antes kamo matulog.
English: Turn off the light before you sleep.

Hiligaynon: Masanag ang bulan sa tunga sang latagon.
English: The moon is bright in the middle of the field.

Hiligaynon: Madulom ang dalan kon wala sing kasanag.
English: The road is dark if there is no light.

Hiligaynon: Mag-upod kita bwas sa pag-obra.
English: Let's go together to work tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Dasig ang aton lakat pakadto didto.
English: Our walk towards there is fast.

Hiligaynon: Mahina ang dagan sang karusa subong.
English: The cart's movement is slow today.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka oras ang aton byahe?
English: How many hours is our trip?

Hiligaynon: Tatlo ka oras ang byahe sang bus.
English: The bus trip is three hours long.

Hiligaynon: Malaka na lang ang tawo sa dalan.
English: There are only a few people on the road now.

Hiligaynon: Maayong gab-i sa inyo tanan diri.
English: Good night to all of you here.

Hiligaynon: Magpahuway kamo sing maayo subong.
English: Rest well now.

Hiligaynon: Tubtob sa liwat naton nga pagkitaay.
English: Until our next meeting.

Hiligaynon: Ginasiling ko sa imo ang matuod.
English: I am telling you the truth.

Hiligaynon: Magpati ka sa akon mga hambal.
English: Believe in my words.

Hiligaynon: Indi gid ako magbutig sa imo.
English: I will never lie to you.

Hiligaynon: Ambot kon ngaa natabo ini sa aton.
English: I don't know why this happened to us.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang naghimo sini nga sala?
English: Who made this mistake?

Hiligaynon: Ako ang nag-ako sang akon sala.
English: I admitted my mistake.

Hiligaynon: Pasayluha ako sa akon kakulangan.
English: Forgive me for my shortcomings.

Hiligaynon: Hu-o, ginapatawad ko na ikaw.
English: Yes, I forgive you already.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa imo daku nga pasensya.
English: Thank you for your great patience.

Hiligaynon: Wala na sing kabilinggan sa akon.
English: It is of no concern to me anymore.

Hiligaynon: Mag-ayuhay kita tanan nga mag-ulutod.
English: Let's all get along as siblings.

Hiligaynon: Maayo gid ang aton pag-inupdanay.
English: Our companionship/relationship is very good.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga magdugay ini.
English: I hope this lasts long.

Hiligaynon: Amen, amo man sa imo.
English: Amen, the same to you.

Hiligaynon: Paalam na sa inyo tanan subong.
English: Farewell to all of you for now.

Hiligaynon: Gusto ko magpatindog sang balay.
English: I want to build a house.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka gatos ka semento ang kinahanglan?
English: How many hundred bags of cement are needed?

Hiligaynon: Mahal ang bakal sa hardware subong.
English: Steel is expensive at the hardware store now.

Hiligaynon: Malapad ang pundasyon sang bilding.
English: The building's foundation is wide.

Hiligaynon: Diin mo ginbutang ang martilyo?
English: Where did you put the hammer?

Hiligaynon: Gamita ang lansi para sa lansang.
English: Use the claw bar for the nail.

Hiligaynon: Mabug-at ang mga hallow blocks.
English: The hollow blocks are heavy.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka tapakan ang kalabaon sini?
English: How many feet is the length of this?

Hiligaynon: Maalam gid ang amon panday.
English: Our carpenter is very skilled.

Hiligaynon: Kanaryas ang kolor sang amon pader.
English: The color of our wall is yellow.

Hiligaynon: Kay-uha ang atop nga nagatulo.
English: Fix the roof that is leaking.

Hiligaynon: Gamita ang kawayan para sa kudal.
English: Use bamboo for the fence.

Hiligaynon: Matig-a gid ang kahoy nga tugas.
English: Molave wood is very hard.

Hiligaynon: Manubo lang ang atop sang amon balay.
English: The roof of our house is just low.

Hiligaynon: Mataas ang hagdanan pakadto sa ibabaw.
English: The stairs going up are high.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka kwarto ang gusto mo ipahimo?
English: How many rooms do you want to have made?

Hiligaynon: Buksi ang pultahan sang kusina.
English: Open the kitchen door.

Hiligaynon: Siraduha ang bintana kon gab-i.
English: Close the window at night.

Hiligaynon: Limpyuha ang mga dagi sa salog.
English: Clean the dust on the floor.

Hiligaynon: Pinturahan naton ang gwa sang balay.
English: Let's paint the outside of the house.

Hiligaynon: Ano ang sukul sang inyo duta?
English: What is the measurement of your land?

Hiligaynon: Malapad ang ugsaran sa atubang.
English: The yard in front is wide.

Hiligaynon: Diin dampi ang banyo sa sining plano?
English: Where is the bathroom in this plan?

Hiligaynon: Magang-an lang ining mga tabla.
English: These wooden boards are just light.

Hiligaynon: Ibutang ang mga gamit sa bodega.
English: Put the tools/items in the warehouse.

Hiligaynon: Kinahanglan naton sing dugang nga lansang.
English: We need more nails.

Hiligaynon: Dasig ang ubra sang mga tinawo.
English: The workers' work is fast.

Hiligaynon: Mahina ang pag-uga sang semento tungod sa ulan.
English: The cement is drying slowly because of the rain.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka adlaw ang pahuway sang mga panday?
English: How many days is the carpenters' break?

Hiligaynon: Domingo ang adlaw nga wala sing ubra.
English: Sunday is the day without work.

Hiligaynon: Tapos na ang balay sa masunod nga bulan.
English: The house will be finished next month.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon kami sa amon bag-o nga puluy-an.
English: We are happy in our new home.

Hiligaynon: Maayo gid ang pagkay-ub sang atop.
English: The fixing of the roof was very good.

Hiligaynon: Wala na sing tulo ang amon balay.
English: Our house has no more leaks.

Hiligaynon: Masanag ang suga sa sala.
English: The light in the living room is bright.

Hiligaynon: Madulom ang agi-an sa likod.
English: The passageway at the back is dark.

Hiligaynon: Isira ang kudal para indi makasulod ang sapat.
English: Close the fence so the animals cannot enter.

Hiligaynon: Maugod ang amon kapatas sa site.
English: Our foreman at the site is diligent.

Hiligaynon: Pila ang kabilugan nga gasto naton?
English: How much is our total expense?

Hiligaynon: Ilista ang tanan nga materyales sa papel.
English: List all the materials on the paper.

Hiligaynon: Bakal ka sang pinturang puti.
English: Buy some white paint.

Hiligaynon: Hatagi ako sing gamay nga sinsilyo para sa plete.
English: Give me some small change for the fare.

Hiligaynon: Ari ang bayad para sa inyo ubra.
English: Here is the payment for your work.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa madasig nga pag-obra.
English: Thank you for the fast work.

Hiligaynon: Wala ina sing problema sa amon.
English: That is no problem for us.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa paggamit sang lagari.
English: Be careful in using the saw.

Hiligaynon: Isul-ob ang inyo proteksyon sa ulo.
English: Wear your head protection.

Hiligaynon: Mainit gid sa ibabaw sang atop.
English: It is very hot on top of the roof.

Hiligaynon: Inom kamo sang madamo nga tubig.
English: Drink plenty of water.

Hiligaynon: Pahuway anay kamo sa landong.
English: Rest for a while in the shade.

Hiligaynon: Namit ang amon panyaga subong.
English: Our lunch today is delicious.

Hiligaynon: Ubosa ang kan-on sa inyo pinggan.
English: Finish the rice on your plates.

Hiligaynon: Busog na gid ang mga naga-obra.
English: The workers are very full.

Hiligaynon: Magpadayon kita sa ubra pagkatapos sang pahuway.
English: Let's continue working after the rest.

Hiligaynon: Husto gid ang timbang sang mga semento.
English: The weight of the cement bags is exactly right.

Hiligaynon: Indi magdaya sa pagtakus sang duta.
English: Do not cheat in measuring the land.

Hiligaynon: Matuod gid ang ginasiling sang amon panday.
English: What our carpenter says is really true.

Hiligaynon: Respetuha ang luyag sang tag-iya.
English: Respect the wishes of the owner.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga mangin matig-a ining balay.
English: I hope this house will be sturdy.

Hiligaynon: Amen, mangin maayo gid ang tanan.
English: Amen, everything will be very good.

Hiligaynon: Diin ang paradahan sang trak sang semento?
English: Where is the cement truck terminal/parking?

Hiligaynon: Malayo pa bala ang inyo kargahan?
English: Is your loading area still far?

Hiligaynon: Malapit na lang kita sa kanto.
English: We are almost at the corner.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ining mga kagamitan sa sulod.
English: Bring these tools inside.

Hiligaynon: Basi madula ang iban nga gamit sa gwa.
English: The other tools outside might get lost.

Hiligaynon: Siraduha ang bodega antes magpuli.
English: Close the warehouse before going home.

Hiligaynon: Mapuli na kami sa amon pamilya.
English: We are going home to our families now.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon kami kay tapos na ang ubra subong.
English: We are happy because today's work is finished.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa dalan pirme.
English: Always be careful on the road.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ining pasalubong para sa inyo bata.
English: Take this gift for your children.

Hiligaynon: Salamat gid sa inyo kaayo sa amon.
English: Thank you very much for your kindness to us.

Hiligaynon: Wala ina sing kabilinggan sa akon.
English: That is of no concern to me.

Hiligaynon: Magkitaay kita liwat bwas sa aga.
English: Let's see each other again tomorrow morning.

Hiligaynon: Alas-syete kita magasugod ubra.
English: We will start working at seven o'clock.

Hiligaynon: Hu-o, maga-abot kami sa oras.
English: Yes, we will arrive on time.

Hiligaynon: Maayong gab-i sa inyo tanan.
English: Good night to you all.

Hiligaynon: Magtulog kita sing maayo subong.
English: Let's sleep well now.

Hiligaynon: Bugtaw kita sa kasanagon sang aga.
English: We will wake up at the crack of dawn.

Hiligaynon: Mag-obra kita para sa aton palaabuton.
English: Let's work for our future.

Hiligaynon: Ang ihibalo kag ubra amo ang manggad.
English: Knowledge and work are wealth.

Hiligaynon: Maayo gid ang aton pag-inupdanay.
English: Our partnership/companionship is very good.

Hiligaynon: Indi mag-untat sa pagbinuligay.
English: Do not stop helping each other.

Hiligaynon: Masanag ang aton padulungan.
English: Our destination is bright.

Hiligaynon: Ginasiling ko sa imo ang matuod.
English: I am telling you the truth.

Hiligaynon: Magpati ka sa akon mga plano.
English: Believe in my plans.

Hiligaynon: Indi gid ako magbutig sa inyo.
English: I will never lie to you.

Hiligaynon: Ambot kon ngaa wala pa nag-abot ang karga.
English: I don't know why the cargo hasn't arrived yet.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang naghimo sini nga drowing?
English: Who made this drawing?

Hiligaynon: Ako ang nagplano sang sining balay.
English: I was the one who planned this house.

Hiligaynon: Pasayluha ako kon may kakulangan.
English: Forgive me if there are shortcomings.

Hiligaynon: Hu-o, maayo man ang tanan.
English: Yes, everything is fine.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa inyo daku nga pasensya.
English: Thank you for your great patience.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga magdugay ining bilding.
English: I hope this building lasts long.

Hiligaynon: Paalam na sa inyo subong.
English: Farewell to you for now.

Hiligaynon: Tubtob sa liwat naton nga pagkitaay.
English: Until our next meeting.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa inyo lakat.
English: Be careful on your way.

Hiligaynon: Amen, Dios mag-upod sa aton tanan.
English: Amen, God be with us all.

Hiligaynon: Makadto kita sa kapitolyo bwas.
English: We are going to the capitol tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang kapitan sang inyo barangay?
English: Who is the captain of your barangay?

Hiligaynon: Nagpirma sia sang kasulatan sa abogado.
English: He/She signed a document with the lawyer.

Hiligaynon: May ara kami sing sinapol sa plasa.
English: We have a meeting at the plaza.

Hiligaynon: Indi kamo maglapas sa kasuguan.
English: Do not violate the law.

Hiligaynon: Kinahanglan naton magbayad sang buhis.
English: We need to pay taxes.

Hiligaynon: Diin dampi ang opisina sang mayor?
English: Where is the mayor's office located?

Hiligaynon: Nakakuha na ako sang sedula.
English: I have already obtained a community tax certificate.

Hiligaynon: May reklamo ang akon kaingod.
English: My neighbor has a complaint.

Hiligaynon: Nag-atubang sila sa lupon sang barangay.
English: They faced the barangay mediation board.

Hiligaynon: Isulat ang imo panaksi sa papel.
English: Write your testimony on the paper.

Hiligaynon: Indi mag-obra sing kinagula sa banwa.
English: Do not cause a disturbance in town.

Hiligaynon: Respetuha ang kinamatarung sang iban.
English: Respect the rights of others.

Hiligaynon: Pila ang multa sa sining sala?
English: How much is the fine for this offense?

Hiligaynon: Dakop sang pulis ang kawatan.
English: The thief was caught by the police.

Hiligaynon: Priso na sia sa sulod sang karsel.
English: He/She is already imprisoned inside the jail.

Hiligaynon: Magbinuligay kita para sa kalinong.
English: Let us help each other for peace.

Hiligaynon: Maugod ang amon mga opisyales.
English: Our officials are hardworking.

Hiligaynon: San-o ang adlaw sang eleksyon?
English: When is the day of the election?

Hiligaynon: Botante na ako sa sining banwa.
English: I am already a voter in this town.

Hiligaynon: Indi magbaligya sang imo boto.
English: Do not sell your vote.

Hiligaynon: Matuod gid ang ginasiling sang saksi.
English: What the witness says is really true.

Hiligaynon: Pataura ang imo ihibalo sa laye.
English: Sharpen your knowledge of the law.

Hiligaynon: Ambot kon sin-o ang naghimo sang sala.
English: I don't know who committed the offense.

Hiligaynon: Ako ang nag-ako sang akon kakulangan.
English: I admitted my shortcoming.

Hiligaynon: Pasayluha ako sa akon paglapas.
English: Forgive me for my violation.

Hiligaynon: Hu-o, ginapatawad ko na ikaw.
English: Yes, I forgive you already.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga indi na ini maliwat.
English: I hope this won't happen again.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa imo daku nga pasensya.
English: Thank you for your great patience.

Hiligaynon: Wala na sing gamo sa amon lugar.
English: There is no more trouble in our place.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon kami sa amon pagpuyo.
English: We are happy in our living.

Hiligaynon: Mag-ayuhay kita tanan nga pumuluyo.
English: Let's all get along as citizens.

Hiligaynon: Maayo gid ang aton pag-inupdanay.
English: Our companionship is very good.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga mag-uswag ang aton banwa.
English: I hope our town prospers.

Hiligaynon: Amen, mangin maayo ang tanan.
English: Amen, everything will be well.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka tuig ang termino sang mayor?
English: How many years is the mayor's term?

Hiligaynon: Tatlo ka tuig ang tagsa ka termino.
English: Each term is three years long.

Hiligaynon: Kinahanglan naton sing lisensya sa pag-obra.
English: We need a license to work/operate.

Hiligaynon: Ipakita ang imo dokumento sa guard.
English: Show your documents to the guard.

Hiligaynon: Bukas ang opisina halin alas-otso.
English: The office is open from eight o'clock.

Hiligaynon: Sirado na sila sa hapon.
English: They are already closed in the afternoon.

Hiligaynon: Husto gid ang imo gindala nga papel.
English: The papers you brought are exactly right.

Hiligaynon: Ibutang ang selyo sa idalom.
English: Put the seal at the bottom.

Hiligaynon: Batuna ining sertipiko sang pagkilala.
English: Accept this certificate of recognition.

Hiligaynon: Salamat gid sa inyo pag-alagad.
English: Thank you very much for your service.

Hiligaynon: Wala ina sing kabilinggan sa amon.
English: That is of no concern to us.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa inyo pagpauli.
English: Be careful on your way home.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ining balita sa inyo pamilya.
English: Take this news to your family.

Hiligaynon: Masanag ang aton palaabuton subong.
English: Our future is bright now.

Hiligaynon: Ang katarungan amo ang manggad.
English: Justice is wealth.

Hiligaynon: Indi mag-untat sa pagpangita sang kamatuoran.
English: Do not stop searching for the truth.

Hiligaynon: Malayo ang lalakton pakadto sa korte.
English: It is a long walk to the court.

Hiligaynon: Ari na ang desisyon sang huwes.
English: Here is the decision of the judge.

Hiligaynon: Basaha sing maayo ang direksyon.
English: Read the directions carefully.

Hiligaynon: Isulat ang sabat sa tunga sang linya.
English: Write the answer in the middle of the line.

Hiligaynon: Tapos na ang oras sang pagboto.
English: The time for voting is over.

Hiligaynon: Ihatag ang mga balota sa unahan.
English: Pass the ballots to the front.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa inyo pagpamati sa amon.
English: Thank you for listening to us.

Hiligaynon: Maayong hapon sa inyo tanan diri.
English: Good afternoon to all of you here.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa pagtabok sa dalan.
English: Be careful in crossing the road.

Hiligaynon: Tubtob sa liwat nga pagkitaay naton.
English: Until we see each other again.

Hiligaynon: Maayo gid ang inyo ginpakita subong.
English: What you showed today was very good.

Hiligaynon: Hu-o, maningkamot pa kami gid.
English: Yes, we will strive even harder.

Hiligaynon: Amen, mangin maayo ang komunidad.
English: Amen, the community will be good.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang nagpirma sining kasugtanan?
English: Who signed this agreement?

Hiligaynon: Kami ang nagpirma sa atubang sang saksi.
English: We signed in front of the witness.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka kopya ang kinahanglan naton?
English: How many copies do we need?

Hiligaynon: Duha ka kopya para sa tagsa-tagsa.
English: Two copies for each person.

Hiligaynon: Ibutang ini sa sulod sang sobre.
English: Put this inside the envelope.

Hiligaynon: Siraduha ang sobre sing maayo.
English: Close the envelope properly.

Hiligaynon: Ipadala ini sa koreo bwas.
English: Send this to the post office tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Tagpila ang selyo pakadto sa Manila?
English: How much is the stamp to Manila?

Hiligaynon: Madasig ang pag-abot sang sulat.
English: The arrival of the letter is fast.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa madasig nga pag-alagad.
English: Thank you for the fast service.

Hiligaynon: Wala ina sing problema sa amon.
English: That is no problem for us.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa inyo lakat pirme.
English: Always be careful on your way.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ang ining mga dokumento.
English: Take these documents.

Hiligaynon: Basi malimtan niyo ini sa lamesa.
English: You might forget these on the table.

Hiligaynon: Mapuli na kami sa amon balay.
English: We are going home to our house now.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon kami kay tapos na ini.
English: We are happy because this is finished.

Hiligaynon: Magtulog kamo sing maayo subong.
English: Sleep well now.

Hiligaynon: Bugtaw kita sa kasanagon sang aga.
English: We will wake up at the crack of dawn.

Hiligaynon: Mag-obra kita para sa aton banwa.
English: Let us work for our town.

Hiligaynon: Ang Dios mag-upod sa aton tanan.
English: God be with us all.

Hiligaynon: Maayo gid ang aton padulungan.
English: Our destination is very good.

Hiligaynon: Indi mag-untat sa pagbinuligay.
English: Do not stop helping each other.

Hiligaynon: Masanag ang aton kabuwasan.
English: Our future is bright.

Hiligaynon: Ginasiling ko sa inyo ang kamatuoran.
English: I am telling you the truth.

Hiligaynon: Magpati kamo sa akon mga hambal.
English: Believe in my words.

Hiligaynon: Indi gid ako magbutig sa inyo.
English: I will never lie to you.

Hiligaynon: Ambot kon san-o ini matapos.
English: I don't know when this will end.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang naghimo sining plano?
English: Who made this plan?

Hiligaynon: Ako ang naghimo sini para sa inyo.
English: I made this for you.

Hiligaynon: Pasayluha ako kon may sala ako.
English: Forgive me if I have a mistake.

Hiligaynon: Hu-o, patawad na ang tanan.
English: Yes, everything is forgiven.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa inyo daku nga pasensya.
English: Thank you for your great patience.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga magdugay ining kalinong.
English: I hope this peace lasts long.

Hiligaynon: Paalam na sa inyo tanan subong.
English: Farewell to all of you for now.

Hiligaynon: Tubtob sa liwat naton nga pagkitaay.
English: Until our next meeting.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa inyo lakat.
English: Be careful on your way.

Hiligaynon: Amen, Dios mag-upod sa aton.
English: Amen, God be with us.

Hiligaynon: Malayo pa bala ang inyo banwa?
English: Is your town still far?

Hiligaynon: Malapit na lang kita mag-abot.
English: We are almost there.

Hiligaynon: Diin dampi ang paradahan sang bus?
English: Where is the bus terminal located?

Hiligaynon: Pila ang plete pakadto sa syudad?
English: How much is the fare to the city?

Hiligaynon: Sakay na kamo sa dyipney.
English: Get on the jeepney now.

Hiligaynon: Para diri lang sa kanto, palihog.
English: Just here at the corner, please.

Hiligaynon: Dasig ang dalagan sang sining sa-salakyan.
English: This vehicle is running fast.

Hiligaynon: Mahina ang lakat sang trapiko subong.
English: The traffic is moving slowly right now.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka oras ang byahe sa barko?
English: How many hours is the trip by boat?

Hiligaynon: Malapad ang suba nga aton tabukon.
English: The river we are crossing is wide.

Hiligaynon: Mataas ang pampang sang sapa.
English: The bank of the creek is high.

Hiligaynon: Kadto kita sa putok-putokan sang bukid.
English: Let’s go to the peak of the mountain.

Hiligaynon: Matahum ang lanyog sa kapatagan.
English: The view in the plains is beautiful.

Hiligaynon: Madamo sang kurbada ang dalan.
English: The road has many curves.

Hiligaynon: Malandog ang dalan kon naga-ulan.
English: The road is slippery when it rains.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ang imo mapa kag kompas.
English: Bring your map and compass.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang drayber sang sining trak?
English: Who is the driver of this truck?

Hiligaynon: May lisensya ka bala sa pagmaneho?
English: Do you have a license to drive?

Hiligaynon: Ipakita ang imo ticket sa konduktor.
English: Show your ticket to the conductor.

Hiligaynon: San-o ang sunod nga biyahe?
English: When is the next trip?

Hiligaynon: Alas-dies sang aga ang lakat.
English: The departure is at ten in the morning.

Hiligaynon: Naguba ang makina sang amon de-motor.
English: Our motorized boat’s engine broke.

Hiligaynon: Kay-uha ang ruweda sang bisikleta.
English: Fix the wheel of the bicycle.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka litro nga gasolina ang kinahanglan?
English: How many liters of gasoline are needed?

Hiligaynon: Puno na ang tanan nga lingkuranan.
English: All the seats are already full.

Hiligaynon: Wala na sing lugar para sa bagahe.
English: There is no more room for luggage.

Hiligaynon: Ibutang ang imo bag sa idalom.
English: Put your bag underneath.

Hiligaynon: Hawid ka sing maayo sa kawayan.
English: Hold on tightly to the bamboo.

Hiligaynon: Indi ka mag-umpisog sa iban.
English: Do not crowd/push against others.

Hiligaynon: Matugnaw ang hangin sa bintana.
English: The wind from the window is cold.

Hiligaynon: Mainit gid ang byahe kon udto.
English: The trip is very hot at noon.

Hiligaynon: Diin ang pinakamalapit nga gasolinahan?
English: Where is the nearest gas station?

Hiligaynon: May bintana bala sa inyo barko?
English: Is there a window in your boat?

Hiligaynon: Madalom ang dagat sa sining binit.
English: The sea is deep on this side.

Hiligaynon: Mababaw lang ang tubig sa baybay.
English: The water at the shore is shallow.

Hiligaynon: Sunda lang ining banas pakadto sa uma.
English: Just follow this trail to the farm.

Hiligaynon: Nagtalang kami sa tunga sang kagulangan.
English: We got lost in the middle of the forest.

Hiligaynon: Pamangkuton naton ang tawo sa dalan.
English: Let's ask the person on the road.

Hiligaynon: Husto gid ang ginasiling sang mapa.
English: What the map says is exactly right.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa pagtudlo sang dalan.
English: Thank you for showing the way.

Hiligaynon: Wala ina sing problema sa amon.
English: That is no problem for us.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa pagtabok.
English: Be careful in crossing.

Hiligaynon: Magpreno ka kon may naga-agi.
English: Brake if someone is passing.

Hiligaynon: Masanag ang mga suga sa dalan.
English: The street lights are bright.

Hiligaynon: Madulom ang eskinita sa likod.
English: The alleyway at the back is dark.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka kilometro ang distansya?
English: How many kilometers is the distance?

Hiligaynon: Isá ka oras ang lakat kon madasig.
English: It’s a one-hour walk if fast.

Hiligaynon: Kapoy na ang akon batiis sa lakat.
English: My calves are tired from walking.

Hiligaynon: Pahuway anay kita sa idalom sang puno.
English: Let’s rest for a while under the tree.

Hiligaynon: Inom ka sang tubig halin sa pitser.
English: Drink water from the pitcher.

Hiligaynon: Namit ang hangin diri sa ibabaw.
English: The air here at the top is pleasant.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon kami sa amon pag-abot.
English: We are happy upon our arrival.

Hiligaynon: Ari na kami sa amon padulungan.
English: We are now at our destination.

Hiligaynon: Diin mo ginbutang ang amon gamit?
English: Where did you put our things?

Hiligaynon: Isulod ang tanan sa bag-o nga sako.
English: Put everything inside the new sack.

Hiligaynon: Mabug-at ining karga nga asukar.
English: This load of sugar is heavy.

Hiligaynon: Magang-an lang ang akon maleta.
English: My suitcase is just light.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga mangin maayo ang byahe.
English: I hope the trip will be good.

Hiligaynon: Amen, salamat sa imo pag-unong.
English: Amen, thank you for your company.

Hiligaynon: Mag-upod kita liwat sa masunod.
English: Let's go together again next time.

Hiligaynon: Pila ang ibayad ko sa imo?
English: How much should I pay you?

Hiligaynon: Husto na ang beinte pesos.
English: Twenty pesos is enough.

Hiligaynon: Ari ang akon plete sa dyip.
English: Here is my jeepney fare.

Hiligaynon: Batuna ining gamay nga sukli.
English: Accept this small change.

Hiligaynon: Salamat gid sa husto nga pag-isip.
English: Thank you very much for the correct counting.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam ka pirme sa imo lakat.
English: Always be careful on your way.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ang imo kapúti basi mag-ulan.
English: Bring your raincoat in case it rains.

Hiligaynon: Igalang ang dulunan sang inyo propiedad.
English: Respect the boundary of your property.

Hiligaynon: Ginapanag-iyahan sang banwa ang suba.
English: The river is owned by the town.

Hiligaynon: Halungi ang mga pagkabutang sang komunidad.
English: Take care of the belongings/property of the community.

Hiligaynon: Wala sing may mag-angkon sang karsada.
English: No one shall claim the road/street.

Hiligaynon: Ipaidalom sa pag-usisa ang sining ulumhan.
English: Subject this rice field to inspection.

Hiligaynon: Ginpahamtang ang bag-o nga merkado sa idalom.
English: The new market was established below.

Hiligaynon: Kinahanglan sing permiso antes magpatindog sang balay-talapan.
English: A permit is needed before building the office building.

Hiligaynon: Matinlo ang palibot sang simbahan.
English: The surroundings of the church are clean.

Hiligaynon: Nagpagwa sang pahibalo ang kapitan.
English: The captain released an announcement/notice.

Hiligaynon: Palapnaga ang balita sa bug-os nga banwa.
English: Spread the news to the whole town.

Hiligaynon: Kinahanglan naton sing madasig nga hulag.
English: We need swift action/movement.

Hiligaynon: Ipabati ang inyo reklamo sa nagadumala.
English: Make your complaint heard to the management.

Hiligaynon: Maghatag sang pormal nga panawagan bwas.
English: Give a formal appeal/call tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Gintawag ang tanan nga sakop sang baranggay.
English: All members/constituents of the barangay were called.

Hiligaynon: Ipaathag sing mayo ang katuyuan sang proyekto.
English: Explain well the purpose of the project.

Hiligaynon: Nag-abot ang sulat halin sa pangulo.
English: The letter from the leader arrived.

Hiligaynon: Pamatian naton ang panugyan sang manunudlo.
English: Let us listen to the suggestion/advice of the teacher.

Hiligaynon: Pukawa ang kabalaka sang mga pumuluyo.
English: Awaken the concern of the residents.

Hiligaynon: Ginahandum naton ang masanag nga kabuwasan.
English: We dream of a bright future.

Hiligaynon: Tinguhaan naton ang kauswagan sang Pavia.
English: Let us strive for the progress/development of Pavia.

Hiligaynon: Indi pagkalimti ang pag-ulikid sa isigkatawo.
English: Do not forget the care/concern for your fellowman.

Hiligaynon: Matum-ok naton ang kalipay paagi sa pagbinuligay.
English: We will achieve happiness through helping each other.

Hiligaynon: Daku ang aton katungdanan sa mga bata.
English: Our duty/responsibility to the children is great.

Hiligaynon: Mag-ugyon kita sa pagtapos sang sining pagpangabudlay.
English: Let us unite in finishing this labor.

Hiligaynon: Ipabugal ang aton kulturanhon nga manggad.
English: Be proud of our cultural wealth.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga magpadayon ang aton paghilom.
English: May our healing continue.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon nga nag-uswag ang aton pangabuhi.
English: Our livelihood joyfully progressed.

Hiligaynon: Sa Dios ang himaya kag sa banwa ang kadaugan.
English: Glory to God and victory to the town.

Hiligaynon: Mag-tig-ang ka na para sa panyaga.
English: Cook rice now for lunch.

Hiligaynon: Namit ang laswa nga ginluto ni Nanay.
English: The local vegetable soup Mother cooked is delicious.

Hiligaynon: Ibutang ang ginamos sa gamay nga yahong.
English: Put the shrimp paste in a small bowl.

Hiligaynon: Aslumi ang sabaw sang batwan.
English: Sour the soup with batwan fruit.

Hiligaynon: Nagabukal na ang tubig sa kolon.
English: The water in the clay pot is boiling.

Hiligaynon: Isugba naton ining isda sa baga.
English: Let's grill this fish on the embers.

Hiligaynon: Hiwaha ang paho sing manipis.
English: Slice the mango thinly.

Hiligaynon: Puga-i sang kalamansi ang inasal.
English: Squeeze calamansi on the barbecue/roasted meat.

Hiligaynon: Timplahi sang langgaw kag toyo.
English: Season it with vinegar and soy sauce.

Hiligaynon: Kinahanglan ta sang luy-a para sa manok.
English: We need ginger for the chicken.

Hiligaynon: Maanghang ang katumbal nga akon nakuha.
English: The chili I got is spicy.

Hiligaynon: Puno sang kalamay ang aton kape.
English: Our coffee is full of sugar.

Hiligaynon: Lutua ang panyapon antes magdulom.
English: Cook dinner before it gets dark.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang nagkaon sang akon paha-aw?
English: Who ate my leftover breakfast/cold rice?

Hiligaynon: Hugasi ang mga pinggan sa banggerahan.
English: Wash the plates at the traditional dish rack.

Hiligaynon: Initon mo ang nabilin nga sud-an.
English: Heat up the leftover viand/dish.

Hiligaynon: Gisa ang ahos kag sibuyas.
English: Sauté the garlic and onion.

Hiligaynon: Prito kamo sang itlog para sa pamahaw.
English: Fry some eggs for a snack/breakfast.

Hiligaynon: Malapuyot ang sabaw sang sining linugaw.
English: The soup of this porridge is thick.

Hiligaynon: Namit isawsaw ang pandesal sa kape.
English: It's delicious to dip the pandesal in coffee.

Hiligaynon: Kihad-kihada ang karne nga baboy.
English: Slice/chop up the pork meat.

Hiligaynon: Tapha ang bugas antes tig-angon.
English: Winnow the rice before cooking.

Hiligaynon: Pabukala ang unod asta maghumok.
English: Boil the meat until it softens.

Hiligaynon: Ginadili ang pagkaon sang hilaw nga isda.
English: Eating raw fish is forbidden.

Hiligaynon: Kuhaa ang himbis sang isda.
English: Remove the scales of the fish.

Hiligaynon: Balibari sang asin ang kasag.
English: Sprinkle salt on the crab.

Hiligaynon: Ituslob ang puto sa tsokolate.
English: Dip the puto in the chocolate.

Hiligaynon: Nasunog ang dukót sa idalom.
English: The crust/bottom rice got burned.

Hiligaynon: Manamit ang tinu-om nga manok.
English: The steamed/wrapped chicken is delicious.

Hiligaynon: Ubosa ang imo kan-on sa pinggan.
English: Finish your rice on the plate.

Hiligaynon: Nagabaho ang dunot nga paho.
English: The rotten mango smells.

Hiligaynon: Putsa sang dahon sang saging ang ibos.
English: Wrap the sticky rice (ibos) with a banana leaf.

Hiligaynon: Ginamos ang naghatag sabor sa utan.
English: Shrimp paste gave flavor to the vegetables.

Hiligaynon: Paggisa, idugang ang giniling.
English: When sautéing, add the ground meat.

Hiligaynon: Manamis-namis ang duga sang sining saba.
English: The juice of this saba banana is somewhat sweet.

Hiligaynon: Mapait ang ampalaya apang masustansya.
English: The bitter gourd is bitter but nutritious.

Hiligaynon: Maglubok sang bugas sa lusong.
English: Pound the rice in the mortar.

Hiligaynon: I-tuhog ang mga hiwa sang baboy.
English: Skewer the slices of pork.

Hiligaynon: Kuhaa ang lango-lango sa lamisa.
English: Remove the flies from the table.

Hiligaynon: Bawal usapon ang bukog.
English: Chewing the bone is forbidden.

Hiligaynon: Masabor ang sabaw sang manok nga bisaya.
English: The soup of the native chicken is tasty.

Hiligaynon: Ayaga ang harina antes gamiton.
English: Sift the flour before using.

Hiligaynon: Baliskara ang isda sa kalaha.
English: Flip the fish in the frying pan/wok.

Hiligaynon: Hinaya ang kalayo sa kalan.
English: Lower the fire on the stove.

Hiligaynon: Nataktak ang tinapay sa salog.
English: The bread fell onto the floor.

Hiligaynon: Diin mo ginbutang ang sandok?
English: Where did you put the ladle?

Hiligaynon: Punas-punasi ang lamisa despues sang kaon.
English: Wipe the table after eating.

Hiligaynon: Nabusog gid ako sa daku nga panyaga.
English: I am very full from the big lunch.

Hiligaynon: Gutom pa bala ang mga bata?
English: Are the children still hungry?

Hiligaynon: Mag-inom sang tubig para matulon ang pagkaon.
English: Drink water to swallow the food.

Hiligaynon: Ang mabinulabula nga suba, manabaw.
English: A bubbling river is shallow. (Proverb: Empty vessels make the most noise)

Hiligaynon: Kon ano ang gintanom, amo ang anihon.
English: What you sow is what you reap.

Hiligaynon: Wala sang aso kon wala sang kalayo.
English: There is no smoke where there is no fire.

Hiligaynon: Ang kamatuoran magaguwa gid sa ulihi.
English: The truth will always come out in the end.

Hiligaynon: Nagabulus-bulos lang ang kahimtangan.
English: Circumstances just take turns/rotate. (Proverb: The wheel of fortune turns)

Hiligaynon: Nagapanago ang kapawa sa likod sang gal-um.
English: The light hides behind the clouds.

Hiligaynon: Ay abaw! Kadaku sang imo balay.
English: Oh my! Your house is so big.

Hiligaynon: Baw, katahum gid sang sining pispis!
English: Wow, this bird is very beautiful!

Hiligaynon: Te, ano ang aton himuon subong?
English: So/Then, what are we going to do now?

Hiligaynon: Ngaa naghibi ka haw?
English: Why did you cry? (Haw is a question particle)

Hiligaynon: Wala ka pa gid nakakaon gali?
English: Oh/Really, you haven't eaten yet?

Hiligaynon: Daw nagasakit ang akon ulo.
English: It seems like my head is hurting.

Hiligaynon: Sige na, mauna na lang ako bwas.
English: Alright then/already, I'll just go ahead tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Ambot sa imo, wala ako kabalo.
English: I don't know with you, I don't know anything.

Hiligaynon: Basi mag-ulan mamaya sa hapon.
English: Maybe it will rain later this afternoon.

Hiligaynon: Ginhambal niya kuno nga maabot sia subong.
English: He/she supposedly said / they say they would arrive today.

Hiligaynon: Amo gid ina ang kabuhi sang tawo.
English: That is exactly how human life is.

Hiligaynon: Indi man malain ang mangin maugod.
English: It is also not bad to be diligent.

Hiligaynon: Wala ta may mahimo sina nga butang.
English: We cannot do anything about that matter/thing.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga matuman ang imo handum.
English: May it be / I hope your dream comes true.

Hiligaynon: Maayo na lang kay wala may nasamaran.
English: It's a good thing no one was hurt/injured.

Hiligaynon: Madamo nga salamat sa imo ginhatag.
English: Many thanks for what you gave.

Hiligaynon: Kon mag-ugyon kita, malampuwasan naton ini.
English: If we unite, we will overcome this.

Hiligaynon: Wala sang may makapugong sa kapalaran.
English: No one can stop destiny/fate.

Hiligaynon: Mahinay ang lakat apang sigurado.
English: The walk is slow but sure.

Hiligaynon: Wala sa edad ang pagka-maalam.
English: Wisdom/intelligence is not in age.

Hiligaynon: Kon sin-o ang nagapanikasog, sia ang magadaug.
English: Whoever strives hard, is the one who will win.

Hiligaynon: Ang paglaum wala gid nagakadula.
English: Hope never truly disappears.

Hiligaynon: Padayon lang sa imo ginahimo.
English: Just continue with what you are doing.

Hiligaynon: Matam-is ang kalipay pagkatapos sang kasubo.
English: Happiness is sweet after sorrow.

Hiligaynon: Pasensyahi lang ang iya pagka-bataon.
English: Just be patient with his/her childishness.

Hiligaynon: Diin ka man makadto, dal-a ang leksyon.
English: Wherever you go, bring the lesson.

Hiligaynon: Wala pulos ang paghinulsol sa ulihi.
English: Repentance at the end is useless.

Hiligaynon: Tinguhai nga mangin malipayon adlaw-adlaw.
English: Strive to be happy every day.

Hiligaynon: Halungi ang imo ginahambal sa kapwa.
English: Be careful with what you say to others/fellowmen.

Hiligaynon: Indi paghukmi ang tawo sa iya panagway.
English: Do not judge a person by their appearance/face.

Hiligaynon: Sa oras sang kapi-ot, makita ang matuod nga abyan.
English: In times of hardship, true friends are seen.

Hiligaynon: Buksi ang imo huna-huna sa bag-o nga ihibalo.
English: Open your mind to new knowledge.

Hiligaynon: May tuman nga oras para sa tanan nga butang.
English: There is a proper time for every thing.

Hiligaynon: Ang kabuhi daw pareho sang balod sa dagat.
English: Life is like the waves in the sea.

Hiligaynon: Matuod gid man ang hambal sang katigulangan.
English: The words of the elders/ancestors are indeed true.

Hiligaynon: Ang tawo nga wala sing handum daw patay na.
English: A person with no ambition/dream is like they are dead.

Hiligaynon: Ihatag ang bulig sing hugot sa tagipusuon.
English: Give help wholeheartedly (tightly from the heart).

Hiligaynon: Matapos man ang kalisod sa husto nga tion.
English: Hardship will also end at the right time.

Hiligaynon: Walay sapayan kon mapukan, bangon liwat.
English: Never mind if you fall, rise again.

Hiligaynon: Ang matuod nga manggad amo ang ihibalo.
English: True wealth is knowledge.

Hiligaynon: Ipakita ang maayo nga pamatasan bisan diin.
English: Show good character/behavior everywhere.

Hiligaynon: Ang tagsa ka adlaw bag-o nga pag-asa.
English: Every day is a new hope.

Hiligaynon: Isalig naton ang tanan sa Makaako.
English: Let us entrust everything to the Creator.

Hiligaynon: Dalayon ang aton paglakat tubtob sa kadaugan.
English: Our journey is continuous until victory.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam ka sa imo paglakat.
English: Be careful in your walking/journey.

Hiligaynon: Gusto ko magdalagan sa higad sang baybay.
English: I want to run by the seashore.

Hiligaynon: Maabtik sia maglumpat sa suba.
English: He/she is quick to jump into the river.

Hiligaynon: Indi kamo mag-untat sa pag-usisa.
English: Do not stop inquiring/examining.

Hiligaynon: Masaku ang mga bata sa paghampang.
English: The children are busy playing.

Hiligaynon: Ihaboy ang basura sa husto nga bulutangan.
English: Throw the trash in the right container.

Hiligaynon: Saka kamo sa itaas sang balay.
English: Go up/climb to the upper part of the house.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam sa pagpanaog sa hagdanan.
English: Be careful in descending/going down the stairs.

Hiligaynon: Lutaw ang gamay nga baroto sa lawod.
English: The small boat is floating in the deep sea.

Hiligaynon: Nagasilaob ang kalayo, gani palayu kamo.
English: The fire is blazing, so move away.

Hiligaynon: Palapit diri sa akon tupad.
English: Move closer here by my side.

Hiligaynon: Luy-a (Luy-ahan) mo ang pag-uyat sang baso.
English: Steady your grip on the glass.

Hiligaynon: Ihuyop ang hangin sa sining kawayan.
English: Blow the wind into this bamboo.

Hiligaynon: Ibutang ang binangon sa salog.
English: Put/Place the machete on the floor.

Hiligaynon: Kuhaa ang imo gamit sa kwarto.
English: Take/Get your things from the room.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ini pakadto sa Pavia.
English: Bring this toward Pavia.

Hiligaynon: Ibilin ang sapatos sa pultahan.
English: Leave the shoes at the door.

Hiligaynon: Mag-upod kita sa pagbulig sa ila.
English: Let's join in helping them.

Hiligaynon: Ihatag ang sining sulat sa kapitan.
English: Give this letter to the captain.

Hiligaynon: Batuna ang akon daku nga pasalamat.
English: Receive/Accept my great thanks.

Hiligaynon: Bantayi ang mga bata sa ugsaran.
English: Watch/Guard the children in the yard.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam sa pagtabok sa karsada.
English: Be careful in crossing the road.

Hiligaynon: Liko kamo sa wala pakadto sa merkado.
English: Turn left toward the market.

Hiligaynon: Padayon lang sa paglakat sa unahan.
English: Just continue walking forward.

Hiligaynon: Untat anay sa inyo pag-istoryahanay.
English: Stop for a while in your conversation.

Hiligaynon: Pukawa ang nagakatulog nga kuring.
English: Wake up the sleeping cat.

Hiligaynon: Pakatuluga ang bata sing maayo.
English: Make the child sleep well.

Hiligaynon: Linggagi ang inyo paghampang sa gwa.
English: Moderate/Quiet down your playing outside.

Hiligaynon: Iwas-was ang panapton sa hangin.
English: Shake/Flick the cloth in the air.

Hiligaynon: Isab-og ang mga liso sa latagon.
English: Scatter/Sow the seeds in the field.

Hiligaynon: Pamigad kamo sang mga paho sa idalom.
English: Gather/Pick up the mangoes underneath.

Hiligaynon: Tindog kamo sing matarung sa atubangan.
English: Stand straight in front.

Hiligaynon: Pungko kamo sa sining matig-a nga bangko.
English: Sit on this hard bench.

Hiligaynon: Hapa kamo kon makabati sang dagu-ob.
English: Lie face down if you hear thunder.

Hiligaynon: Luhod kamo sa sulod sang simbahan.
English: Kneel inside the church.

Hiligaynon: Uli na kamo sa inyo panimalay.
English: Go home now to your household.

Hiligaynon: Sulod kamo sa sulod sang akon balay.
English: Enter/Come in inside my house.

Hiligaynon: Guwa kamo para makita ang balangaw.
English: Go out to see the rainbow.

Hiligaynon: Saka ka sa sanga sang kawayan.
English: Climb the branch of the bamboo.

Hiligaynon: Nanaog na ang tanan halin sa salakyan.
English: Everyone has descended/gotten off the vehicle.

Hiligaynon: Langgoy kita sa mabugnaw nga suba.
English: Let's swim in the cool river.

Hiligaynon: Salum ka sa idalom sang tubig.
English: Dive deep under the water.

Hiligaynon: Butong (Butunga) ang lubid sing maayo.
English: Pull the rope well.

Hiligaynon: Tulod (Tulura) ang daku nga karosa.
English: Push the big cart.

Hiligaynon: Uyat (Uyatan) mo ang akon kamot.
English: Hold my hand.

Hiligaynon: Buy-an (Buy-ani) ang pisi subong.
English: Let go/Release the rope now.

Hiligaynon: Kuskus (Kuskusa) ang tisa sang balay.
English: Scrub/Strum the tiles of the house.

Hiligaynon: Trapu (Trapuha) ang basa nga lamisa.
English: Wipe the wet table.

Hiligaynon: Hugas (Hugasi) ang imo mga kamot.
English: Wash your hands.

Hiligaynon: Ligo ka na antes kita mag-lakat.
English: Bathe now before we go.

Hiligaynon: Kaon na kamo sang inaslum nga utan.
English: Eat now some sour vegetable soup.

Hiligaynon: Inom kamo sang bugnaw nga tubig.
English: Drink some cool water.

Hiligaynon: Tulon (Tuluna) ang bulong nga mapait.
English: Swallow the bitter medicine.

Hiligaynon: Usap (Usapa) sing maayo ang pagkaon.
English: Chew the food well.

Hiligaynon: Tindog ka sing maayo sa karsada.
English: Stand well on the road.

Hiligaynon: Hambal (Hambala) ang kamatuoran sa tanan.
English: Speak/Tell the truth to everyone.

Hiligaynon: Pamati kamo sa ginasiling sang tigulang.
English: Listen to what the elder says.

Hiligaynon: Lantaw kamo sa masanag nga adlaw.
English: Look/Watch at the bright sun.

Hiligaynon: Simhot (Simhota) ang hamot sang bulak.
English: Smell the fragrance of the flower.

Hiligaynon: Tandog (Tanduga) ang mahumok nga panapton.
English: Touch the soft cloth.

Hiligaynon: Batyag (Batyaga) ang daku nga kalipay.
English: Feel the great joy.

Hiligaynon: Panumdum (Panumduma) ang husto nga sabat.
English: Think about/Ponder the right answer.

Hiligaynon: Tuo (Tui) ang akon ginasiling sa imo.
English: Believe what I am saying to you.

Hiligaynon: Salig kamo sa amon kagamhanan.
English: Trust in our authority.

Hiligaynon: Higugma (Higugmaa) ang imo isigkatawo.
English: Love your fellowman.

Hiligaynon: Ulikid (Ulikid) sa mga nagakinahanglan.
English: Care for/Look back on those in need.

Hiligaynon: Bulig (Buligi) ang imo pamilya sa uma.
English: Help your family on the farm.

Hiligaynon: Obra (Obraha) ang imo katungdanan.
English: Work on/Do your duty.

Hiligaynon: Tapos (Tapusa) ang inyo pagpangabudlay.
English: Finish your labor.

Hiligaynon: Pahuway kamo sa landong sang kahoy.
English: Rest in the shade of the tree.

Hiligaynon: Tulog kamo sing maayo subong nga gab-i.
English: Sleep well tonight.

Hiligaynon: Bugtaw kamo sing aga pa bwas.
English: Wake up early tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Lakat kamo pakadto sa simbahan.
English: Walk/Go toward the church.

Hiligaynon: Balik kamo diri sa amon banwa.
English: Return/Come back here to our town.

Hiligaynon: Anot kamo sa amon pagtilipon.
English: Join/Accompany us in our gathering.

Hiligaynon: Sunod kamo sa akon paglakat.
English: Follow me as I walk.

Hiligaynon: Una ka lang sa pagdalagan.
English: Go ahead in running.

Hiligaynon: Ulihi na kita nag-abot sa pista.
English: We arrived late/last at the fiesta.

Hiligaynon: Dungan kita sa pag-amba sang laylay.
English: We sing the melody simultaneously/together.

Hiligaynon: Liwat (Liwata) ang imo ginsiling kaina.
English: Repeat what you said earlier.

Hiligaynon: Isog (Isuga) ang imo buot sa unos.
English: Make brave your heart in the storm.

Hiligaynon: Hadlok kamo sa daku nga balod.
English: You are afraid of the big wave.

Hiligaynon: Kabuylog kita sa sining kadaugan.
English: We are participants/partners in this victory.

Hiligaynon: Ugyon kita para sa kaayuhan sang tanan.
English: Unite for the welfare of all.

Hiligaynon: Daug (Dauga) ang daku nga pa-isog.
English: Win the big competition.

Hiligaynon: Pildi ang nag-intra sa hampang.
English: The one who joined the game lost.

Hiligaynon: Patawad (Patawara) ako sa akon sala.
English: Forgive me for my sin.

Hiligaynon: Saylo (Sayloha) ang gamit sa pihak.
English: Move/Transfer the things to the other side.

Hiligaynon: Ay-o (Ay-uha) ang guba nga kural.
English: Fix/Repair the broken fence.

Hiligaynon: Guba (Gub-a) ang malain nga kaisipan.
English: Destroy/Break the bad thoughts.

Hiligaynon: Tahi (Tahi-a) ang gisi nga panapton.
English: Sew the torn cloth.

Hiligaynon: Hablon (Habla) ang manami nga patadyong.
English: Weave the nice checkered wrap.

Hiligaynon: Gisa (Gisaha) ang ahos kag sibuyas.
English: Sauté the garlic and onion.

Hiligaynon: Luto (Lutu-a) ang aton panyaga subong.
English: Cook our lunch now.

Hiligaynon: Kaon (Kinaon) na nila ang tanan.
English: They have already eaten everything.

Hiligaynon: Inom (Inuma) ang bugnaw nga duga.
English: Drink the cool juice.

Hiligaynon: Tapos na ang aton pag-istoryahanay.
English: Our conversation is finished.

Hiligaynon: Salamat gid sa inyo pag-upod.
English: Thank you very much for joining.

Hiligaynon: Walay sapayan sa inyo kaalwan.
English: You're welcome for your generosity.

Hiligaynon: Paalam na sa inyo tanan subong.
English: Farewell to you all now.

Hiligaynon: Malapad ang dagat sa amon probinsya.
English: The sea is wide in our province.

Hiligaynon: Madalom ang lawod nga aton ginaagyan.
English: The open/deep sea we are passing through is deep.

Hiligaynon: Matinlo ang tubig sa sining suba.
English: The water in this river is clean.

Hiligaynon: May mga isda sa gamay nga sapa.
English: There are fish in the small creek/brook.

Hiligaynon: Malinong ang linaw sa ibabaw sang bukid.
English: The lake on top of the mountain is peaceful.

Hiligaynon: Nagapamunit sila sa higad sang baybay.
English: They are fishing by the beach/shore.

Hiligaynon: Mabaskog ang balod tungod sa hangin.
English: The wave is strong because of the wind.

Hiligaynon: Halong sa pagtabok sa busay.
